style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura pulses gently around Jynx's form, casting distorted reflections in the air like broken mirrors. Slow drifting mist particles swirl in eerie purple hues, while faint energy pulses ripple through her semi-transparent skin, illuminating the surrounding shadows with cold blue-white luminescence. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
